app.title: Nano Portfolio
app.description: Nano Portfolio is a modern, open-source portfolio template for developers. It can automatically import GitHub profile and repository information, and is built with the Vue/Nuxt ecosystem, Octokit APIs, and other modern web technologies.
index.title: Index
index.description: Discover a showcase of frontend, backend, and full-stack projects built with Vue, Nuxt, Svelte, Astro, Vite, TailwindCSS, Less, Sass, Resend, MongoDB, Node, and Nuxt's official libraries. Explore the work of passionate developers and find inspiration for your next portfolio project.
login.title: Login to Nano Portfolio
login.description: Log in to Nano Portfolio to get access to the comment panel.
register.title: Register an Account
register.description: Register an account for Nano Portfolio.
home.title: Home
home.description: The home page of Nano Portfolio. Here you can explore my projects built with Vue, Nuxt, Svelte, Astro, Vite, TailwindCSS, Less, Sass, Resend, MongoDB, Node, and other modern web technologies, and access the GitHub repository or online demo for detailed project information.
about.title: About Nano
about.description: The about page of Nano Portfolio. Here you can find detailed information about Nano, a passionate front-end developer, including skills and fields of study.
career.title: Nano's Career
career.description: The career page of Nano Portfolio. Here you can view detailed information about Nano's work experience, including companies, roles, joining dates and locations, and related projects.
schedule.title: Nano's Schedule
schedule.description: The schedule page of Nano Portfolio. Here you can view Nano's annual plans and career roadmap, and click a schedule card to read more details on Nano Blog.
comments.title: Comments
comments.description: The comments page of Nano Portfolio. Here you can read visitor comments, and you can also log in to leave your own comments or suggestions for this project.
contact.title: Contact with Nano
contact.description: The contact page of Nano Portfolio. Here you can find Nano's contact details, such as email, phone number, and address. You can also submit the contact form to send a message, and Nano will reply to the email address you provide as soon as possible.
